title: Book Of Nonsense
content:
There was an Old Derry down Derry,
    Who loved to see little folks merry;
    So he made them a Book,
    And with laughter they shook,
    At the fun of that Derry down Derry!
meaning: About: Edward Lear was an English artist, illustrator and writer known for his literary nonsense, in poetry and prose, and especially his limericks, a form which he popularised.
